scripts.build-backend: npx tsc src/db.ts --outDir dist --target ES2020 --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && npx tsc src/ipc-handler.ts --outDir dist --target ES2020 --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && npx tsc src/google-calendar.ts --outDir dist --target ES2020 --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && npx tsc src/feiertage-at.ts --outDir dist --target ES2020 --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && npx tsc src/preload.ts --outDir dist --target ES2020 --module commonjs --skipLibCheck
scripts.build: npm run build-backend && npm run build-frontend && npm run build-backend && npm run fix-html-paths
scripts.fix-html-paths: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('dist/index.html','utf8').replace(/\/assets\//g,'./assets/').replace(/\/vite.svg/g,'./vite.svg'); fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.html',html); console.log('HTML-Pfade korrigiert');"
scripts.start: npm run build-all && npm run start-electron
